text: Being here, I feel a curious tension between sterility and creativity. In the first scene, the sleek, glass-walled room appears almost clinical—a space for order and perhaps quiet anticipation. Yet, as I move into the second scene, color and innovation shout from the walls. The juxtaposition of rigid, functional architecture and the experimental energy of R+D sparks questions in me about how environments shape thought. Am I more a passive observer or an active creator here? Spaces influence not just how I move, but how I think and imagine potential.
